anti_claim: The stripping guard is a public-safe read-model over export-denial rules. It is not a complete secret scanner, does not export private bodies, proof bodies, provider payloads, raw private paths, or example secret material, does not give financial advice, mutate source, prove public/secret export, publish, host, or authorize release.

guard_rows.public_replacement: receipt ref, owner route, omission receipt, and redacted summary
guard_rows.source_risk: private source bodies can orient implementation but cannot be copied out
guard_rows.strip_rule: replace body with public ref and body_redacted=true

guard_rows.public_replacement: metadata-only failure class, evidence cell id, and anti-claim
guard_rows.source_risk: formal proof attempts may contain private working state or unreviewed proof claims
guard_rows.strip_rule: export claim strength metadata, never proof body text

guard_rows.public_replacement: synthetic case id, decision row, and validator receipt
guard_rows.source_risk: provider prompts, completions, and tool payloads are not public evidence
guard_rows.strip_rule: publish only public synthetic rows and provider_call_authorized=false

guard_rows.public_replacement: root-relative public refs or stable command ids
guard_rows.source_risk: absolute private paths can leak operator identity and host layout
guard_rows.strip_rule: reject absolute private paths and private-root identifiers from public JSON

guard_rows.public_replacement: negative case id and no-completeness anti-claim
guard_rows.source_risk: secret-like strings require fail-closed handling and cannot be evidence
guard_rows.strip_rule: strip example token material and deny complete secret-scanner claims

guard_rows.public_replacement: no-advice fixture row and synthetic prediction lens
guard_rows.source_risk: prediction and finance reasoning can be shown as synthetic mechanics only
guard_rows.strip_rule: deny trading advice, live market claims, and private dossiers

guard_rows.source_risk: public runtime commands should inspect, compile, or write receipts only
guard_rows.strip_rule: route mutations through owner tests/commits, not runtime lens commands

guard_rows.public_replacement: anti-claim row, authority ceiling, and release_authorized=false
guard_rows.source_risk: a public microcosm is a projection, not release approval or private-root equivalence
guard_rows.strip_rule: deny publication, hosted-public, benchmark, and secret-export claims

public_claim: Microcosm exposes a public/private stripping guard: every public-facing projection names the private body, proof body, provider payload, raw path, secret-completeness, finance, source-mutation, and release claims it must reject before becoming a public runtime surface.
